title: Spiked Ram
effect: After you attack gain 1 mile if you dealt damage.

title: Side-Mounted Bow
effect: If your target has more miles deal +1 damage.

title: Overcharged Engine
effect: Drive +1 road card. Take 1 damage after driving.

title: Turbo Intake
effect: When you keep a 2 mile road card gain +1 mile.

title: Fuel Siphon
effect: When you damage a rival gain 1 scrap.

title: Junk Mechanic
effect: Once per turn repair 1 damage after buying.

title: Spotter Rider
effect: Before driving look at the top road card.

title: Cargo Net
effect: At the start of your turn gain +1 scrap if you are behind.

title: Nitro Bottle
effect: Discard after use to gain +2 miles this turn.
